title: Greetings in Yoruba 1
excerpt: Yoruba greetings encode honour, prayers and good wishes — not just salutations. Learn how kú works.

title: Yoruba Greetings II
excerpt: How kú is used for compliments, felicitations and survival — and the role of Ẹ in Yoruba greetings.

title: Ogun Àgbáyé àkọ́kọ́
excerpt: Ní ọ̀sán ọjọ́ kan ní ọdún 1914, ọdọmọkùnrin kan yí ìtàn gbogbo agbáyé padà.

title: AI ati igbe aye awa ẹda
excerpt: Ilo AI kii ṣe ohun tuntun — ṣugbọn dide ChatGPT ni o waa jẹ ki o gbagbugbaja ninu awujọ ayelujara.
